object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.long_form_open_description: White-painted crown/door trim above the glass door showing areas of chipped or peeling paint and slight discoloration. Runs horizontally across the top of the door opening and into the left trim.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: directly above the sliding glass door and adjacent to the ceiling line
